content: Personal Loan Compare & choose best personal loan with interest rates starting at 9.98% p.a. only. A personal loan offers a quick and hassle-free way to fulfill all your planned and unplanned financial needs. You can also explore pre-approved personal loan offers from multiple lenders, with end-to-end digital processes, zero documentation, no collateral and instant disbursal. ... Read more 100% End-to-End Digital Process Minimal Documentation Required Quick Approval & Faster Disbursal No Collaterals or Hidden Charges Relationship Manager End-to-end support from Paisabazaar experts 100% Secure & Confidential No Spam Calls Google Play Store 4.5 /5 15.5L Reviews 5.7cr+ Satisfied Customers 65+ Lending Partners ₹65k Cr+ Loans Disbursed Get Cashback of ₹ 1,000 * on Loan Disbursal Valid till 31 st March '26 *T&C Apply Instant Personal Loan Get up to ₹50 Lakhs starting at 9.98% Full Name (as on your PAN) Mobile Number Check Eligibility By submitting this form, you have read and agree to the Credit Report Terms of Use , Terms of Use & Privacy Policy Google Play Store 4.5 /5 15.5L Reviews 5.7cr+ Satisfied Customers 65+ Lending Partners ₹65k Cr+ Loans Disbursed 100% End-to-End Digital Process Minimal Documentation Required Quick Approval & Faster Disbursal No Collaterals or Hidden Charges Relationship Manager End-to-end support from Paisabazaar experts 100% Secure & Confidential No Spam Calls Get Personal Loan up to ₹50 lakh with Paisabazaar. How to Raise & Resolve CIBIL dispute
Lowest interest rate offers
Salary: Usually Rs. 15,000-30,000 a month (Do note: if you have an existing relationship with the bank through a savings account, income eligibility may be lower)
Income: Usually Rs. 3 lakh p.a. (may vary among self-employed professionals & non-professionals)
Longer tenure means lower EMIs but total interest paid during the loan tenure goes up
Choose a longer tenure and/or smaller loan amounts to make EMIs affordable
No additional charges on floating rate personal loans ( as per RBI mandate )
In case of fixed-rate personal loans, lenders may levy charges for prepayment or foreclosure
Interest rates offered to self-employed individuals is likely to be higher, due to lesser income certainty and higher risk involved.
Salaried consumers can connect with the Bank that holds their salary account for a personal loan.
Maintain your credit/CIBIL score above 750
